sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports severe right upper arm pain following a volleyball injury, describing a 'dirty' kick to his legs during a spike. He rates the pain as a 9 out of 10. He has been taking ibuprofen every six hours, but reports it's not helping. He denies any allergies. He reports a lumbar fusion six years ago. He denies numbness or tingling in the right arm.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Examination reveals swelling and erythema on the right shoulder, tenderness over the right shoulder, and normal pulses. The remainder of the physical exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient presents with a proximal humerus fracture. The examination confirms swelling and tenderness consistent with the injury. The patient's reported pain level is significant.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I am prescribing lortab 500-5mg every 6 hours as needed for pain. I will order 20 tablets. I will also prescribe a long arm cast and sling to immobilize the arm and reduce pain. We will schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess healing and determine if further intervention is needed.
